items.claim: Brandon Royval has a questionable chin.
items.quote: I really question the chin nowadays of Brandon Wal.

items.claim: Brandon Royval has poor striking defense.
items.quote: the striking defense is is very bad. He's there to be hit.

items.claim: Kavanagh is fast, sharp, accurate, and powerful on the feet.
items.quote: Kavanagh is clean on the feet. He's fast, he's sharp, he's accurate, and he's powerful.

items.claim: Conor McGregor is coming off a five-year layoff.
Conor McGregor is coming off a nasty injury.
items.quote: coming off of a nasty injury.

items.claim: Conor McGregor has only one win in the last decade.
items.quote: one win in like the last decade.

items.claim: Max Holloway is one of the most durable fighters in UFC history.
items.quote: Holloway is like one of the most durable guys in UFC history.

items.claim: Max Holloway has absorbed the most significant strikes in UFC history.
items.quote: this guy's absorbed the most significant strikes out of anybody ever by by a mile.

items.claim: Conor McGregor lacks the cardio to fight for 15 to 25 minutes.
items.quote: I doubt I highly highly doubt McGregor has 25 good minutes in him. I highly doubt he has like 15 good minutes in him.
